title: Update fallback gold and silver prices

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded fallback gold price in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts to ₹1,70,000 per 10g (Gold 24K).
acceptanceCriteria: The fallback gold price is set to 170000 (₹1,70,000 per 10g) in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts.
When the IBJA API is unavailable, the dashboard and ticker display ₹1,70,000/10g for Gold 24K.

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded fallback silver price in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts to ₹3,09,000 per kg.
acceptanceCriteria: The fallback silver price is set to 309000 (₹3,09,000 per kg) in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts.
When the IBJA API is unavailable, the dashboard and ticker display ₹3,09,000/kg for Silver.

constraints: Only update the fallback price values; do not change any other logic, layout, or API integration.
nonGoals: Changing live API data sources or parsing logic.
Modifying the UI layout or styling.
